_comment_project: ─── Project settings ─── Change project_id per site. Restart server after any change — procedures are regenerated automatically.
_comment_committed: Committed performance tracking. null = disabled (no committed SQL generated). To enable: replace null with {} and configure ikwtr_matrix below.
_comment_ikwtr_matrix: iKW/TR lookup matrix. Only used when committed is not null. true = use built-in Danfoss matrix; false + provide custom matrix object.
_comment_ambient: Ambient sensor. null = no ambient sensor at this site. source: 'raw' = EAV table (param_id/param_value); 'metric' = metric table (metric_id/metric_value).
_comment_btu_meter: BTU meter. null = no BTU meter at this site.
_comment_performance: Performance benchmarks used only when committed is not null.
_comment_device_types: Define ALL parameters ONCE per device type.
Every device of the same type shares these params — only table changes per instance.
Changing a param here affects ALL devices of that type at once.
CT fans use {{N}} placeholder — replaced with fan_index per fan automatically.

device_types._comment_CHILLER: 2-compressor Danfoss chiller. Define params once — shared by all chillers in the plant.

CHILLER._comment_params: Raw param IDs from the device source table. run_status: device ON if ANY of these = 1/active.
CHILLER._comment_kw: Power params. Auto per-compressor gating: _01 kW gated by _01 on/off, _02 by _02. use_abs=true → take |value|.
CHILLER._comment_tr: TR formula. Changing formula needs server restart to regenerate procedures. multiplier = 0.33 for m³/h flow, 3.517 for kW flow.
CHILLER._comment_kwh: kWh calculation method. CALCULATE = kW × bucket_hours. DIRECT_CUMULATIVE_CARRY = read cumulative energy counter and take delta.
_comment_display_params: Extra params to store in gl_device_timeseries. Two formats are supported:
Format 1 — Raw param (store AVG as-is, no arithmetic):
→ Reads par_comp_load_01 from source table, stores AVG value as metric 'comp_load_01'
Format 2 — Formula (arithmetic on one or more params):
→ p0, p1, p2... are positional references to the params array (zero-indexed)

device_types._comment_PRIMARY_PUMP: Primary CHW circulation pump. kWh from cumulative energy counter (delta between buckets).
device_types._comment_CONDENSER_PUMP: Condenser water pump. kW from a separate energy meter table. Supply energy_meter_table per instance.
device_types._comment_SECONDARY_PUMP: Condenser water pump. kW from a separate energy meter table. Supply energy_meter_table per instance.
device_types._comment_COOLING_TOWER: Cooling tower parent — container only. Add a fans array to each CT instance (key + fan_index per fan).
device_types._comment_CT_FAN: Single cooling tower fan. {{N}} is replaced with fan_index per fan — defined once, used for all fans across all CTs.

_comment_devices: List every device GROUP at this site.
Each group has: type (must match device_types key), count (for visibility), and instances[].
count must equal the number of entries in instances — it is shown here so you can immediately see how many devices of each type exist.
Each instance needs only: key (unique device ID) + table (raw EAV source table) + any overrides.
All params/formulas come from device_types — nothing repeated per instance.
rated_capacity_tr   — chiller rated TR for load% (number or null)
energy_meter_table  — separate kW source table (CONDENSER_PUMP only)
fans                — fan list for COOLING_TOWER: [{key, fan_index}]
kw.use_abs          — override use_abs for this instance only

devices._comment: 3 chillers — same params/formula, different source tables. Add/remove instances to add/remove chillers.
3 primary CHW pumps — same params, different tables.
3 condenser pumps. kW from energy_meter_table (separate from run_status table).
6 seconadry pumps. kW from energy_meter_table (separate from run_status table).
3 cooling towers, each with 2 fans. fans[] defines fan key + fan_index (used to substitute {{N}} in CT_FAN params).
